title: Cusmon Cobblemon
description: add some fakemon and new evolutions to pokemon
body:
### ATTENTION!!
**I'm sorry everyone, I can't continue the project from Cusmega because I'm so tired of not being able to find the right code so that the Pokemon Mega that I made can work.**

**So maybe I will change this project by adding some fakemon but that's okay. because the mega pokemon that I created will still exist and may experience changes in the future.**
 
**In the future, there will likely be lots of Pokemon that will have custom evolutions**

**for example, I am preparing many evolutions of eevee and maybe in the future many pokemon will receive new evolutionary forms**

So have fun playing!!

WARNING!!
Please to those of you who downloaded my mods or datapacks please do not modify and share with others!. although I do not have a License but this mod and these datapacks belong to me I beg you with your cooperation
